What's up everybody? I wanted to piggyback on the last video and just go over the process in a little bit more nuance. With the 42-day detox cold traffic play, meaning a play that you are marketing to the external audience, the Lead Gen is just the ad that you're going to put out, which is the 42-day detox ad and copy and creative which we provide. You can obviously go beyond what we've provided and come up with your own stuff, which we highly recommend, but these are the ones that I already tested the first time around that worked. You'll have your Lead Gen. Lead Nurture is going to go through the standard Lead Nurture process that we have externally. Whatever you're accustomed to doing with the six-week challenge stuff that you came in originally doing, whether that be ALN or if you're making calls, either one of those processes would work to get them scheduled and get them to show. Once they're in the door, you're going to be selling the 42-day detox for the same price that you sell the six-week challenge for with the exact same hook. The only difference is that the actual meal plan is different. Don't let that get in your head. For an end consumer, the reason we're using 42-day detox is that it's a different wrapper on the same essential process, which is the six-week transformation. It could be a 42-day detox now because that's what's converting and then it might be a 42-day keto plan and there might be a 42-day or a six-week booty thing, whatever it is. At the end of the day, they're going to be changing their food and they're going to be working out for the six weeks. Don't let the wrapper get you twisted. You're still going to sell it the exact same way as you do any six-week program. Cool. The fulfillment piece, the only thing that is different here is that you're actually going to be providing them different meal plan and grocery list, but that's nice to have at the end of the day, like they're going to be changing the way they eat to eat healthier. This just provides different recipes for them to give a try. They're low-fod map foods, so it's less likely to cause inflammation. A lot of people end up losing weight even if they keep their calories the same just because the inflammation goes down on their body, which is great for you. They also feel better, which is also great for them and you because they're happier, which is good. From an overarching standpoint, the fulfillment is more or less identical. They're going to work out three days a week. They're going to get accountability check-in from the trainer once a week. You're going to try and sell them at the abandoned hope at the halfway point. At the end, you're going to still, again, they should have the concept of trying to earn their money based on how much they lose or being able to credit that towards a membership should they take the offer towards a year or six months. The entire process is more or less the same. It's just that instead of getting the original meal plan, you're going to give them a different meal plan and grocery list, but everything is identical. From a process standpoint, it's the same. Resale. Same thing, abandoned hope, and the last way out, again, you're going to try and do it. That's overarching how it works. 42-day detox, I would still tie the weight aspect to it. If anything, it should make it an easier sale because you're like, listen, when you go through the detox, you're going to be losing a ton of information, a ton of extra stuff that you're holding on to right now. It's not uncommon for people to lose half the weight just in the first week, just because all that shit they get out of their body, literally and figuratively. It shouldn't, anyway, impede your ability to close the sale. If anything, it should actually help you because, like I said, they're going to be more likely to hit a weight loss goal because of the nature of the detox. That should give you an overarching process on the cold traffic. The internal play is warm traffic, so your lead generation is coming from posting an ad in your group. The traffic source instead of paying for traffic, you're just going to the traffic you already own. Then here, your lead nurture, we're going to give you the funnel. They're going to click in their schedule because they're your existing clients. Then when they come in for the sale, the sale is just going to be the orientation because they've already bought service. The rotation there is just going to be providing them the same email plan we talked about, then upselling the supplements according to the supplement selling secrets training. Then fulfillment, they're going to have their online login. They're going to have any special workouts. If you want to do that, if you don't want to do that, then you should check in with them every week to make sure that they're getting great results from the detox, the nutrition oriented intervention. Then there is no resell on the back end because they're doing it for a defined period of time and they're already members. This is really a value add and then a way for you to get to extract more value from your existing customers on a monthly basis by dipping into another spending wallet of theirs, which is supplements. Good luck.
